parameter.name: host
parameter.label: Host
parameter.description: IP address or hostname of the NeoSmart Blinds controller.

parameter.name: hubId
parameter.label: Hub ID
parameter.description: The 24-character device ID of the Smart Blinds Hub (found in the app).

parameter.name: protocol
parameter.label: Protocol
parameter.description: The protocol to use for sending commands (http or tcp).

parameter.name: port
parameter.label: Port
parameter.description: Port to use for the connection (8838 for HTTP, 8839 for TCP).

parameter.name: commandDelay
parameter.label: Command Delay
parameter.description: Delay in milliseconds between consecutive commands (prevents the hub from dropping requests).

thing-type.label: NeoSmart Blind
thing-type.description: An individual NeoSmart blind or room group.

parameter.name: blindCode
parameter.label: Blind Code
parameter.description: The blind code (e.g., 021.230-04). Use room code for group control.

parameter.name: closeTime
parameter.label: Close Time
parameter.description: Time in seconds to fully close the blind (used for position estimation).

parameter.name: motorCode
parameter.label: Motor Code
parameter.description: Optional motor code (required for some hub models like C-BR300).

channel-type.label: Position
channel-type.description: Set the position of the blind (0% = open, 100% = closed).

channel-type.label: Favourite Position
channel-type.description: Trigger a favourite position (ON to trigger).
